'''Brosi''' was the [[Homeworld/Legends|homeworld]] of the [[Brosin]] [[Species/Legends|species]], in the [[Thandon Cluster]], a remote place in the [[Corporate Sector/Legends|Corporate Sector]]. It was the fourth [[Planet/Legends|planet]] in the [[Dostra system]], and one of the few homeworlds within the Corporate Sector.<ref name="AIR" />

A lush, temperate forest planet with a large amount of natural flora and fauna, Brosi featured a string of waterfalls more than two kilometers high as a natural wonder. It also had big natural reserves of [[Zinsian]], a dry preservative,<ref name="AIR" /> and [[Hfredium]].<ref name="TEA" />

While having a native [[Near-Human]] [[Sentience/Legends|sentient]] species, the [[Brosin]]s, Brosi was nevertheless settled by [[Galactic Republic/Legends|Old Republic]] colonists centuries before the [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Galactic Empire]]. Those colonists brought with them [[Staplarint]]s to be used as mounts. However, the introduction of [[Repulsorlift/Legends|repulsorlift]] technology aided in the obsolescence of animal mounts, and Staplarints were eventually abandoned. They since became wild and untamed, roaming throughout the countryside.<ref name="AIR" />

The discovery of the Zinsian reserves led the [[Corporate Sector Authority/Legends|Corporate Sector Authority]] to build three Zinsian processing plants ([[Delta 1]], [[Delta 2]], and [[Mailor]]). To do so, they displaced thousands of native Brosins, and many young [[Gender/Legends|male]] Brosins were "hired" by supervisors to work in dangerous extractions. This gave rise to the Brosins dislike of the Corporate Authority government.<ref name="AIR" />

Soon after the first plant began working, the [[Brosin Underground]] was created: A terrorist organization which fought the Corporate Authority power on Brosi. The Underground was led by charismatic young female Brosin, [[Randle Clanse]], who was known to share the profits and equipment stolen from the CSA.<ref name="AIR" />

The [[Security Police/Legends|Security Police]] that CSA commonly used proved ineffective against the Brosin Underground because of their ignorance of the natural landscape. Commanding CSA officer, Supervisor [[Wasith]], tried hiring [[Bounty hunter/Legends|bounty hunters]] to remove the Brosin Underground from the [[Blan Forests]], but they were again unsuccessful: At least one bounty hunter resigned claiming "inadequate support from CSA officers".<ref name="AIR" />

Although the Underground interests were apparently similar to those of the [[Alliance to Restore the Republic/Legends|Rebel Alliance]], their methods were so different that each group considered the other a threat.<ref name="AIR" />
